name: Rand Paul
subject: Hillary's gamed system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot,
If you have "friends" in Washington, D.C. to
grease the political skids for you, chances are that you will do
very well in business these days.
But Patriot, if you're like the rest of us --
if you're not in the "in crowd" that's successfully gamed the
system -- good luck.
Hillary Clinton has long been a part of the
corruption and cronyism that's roiling our economy.
In fact, Hillary Clinton's recent comments,
"We're going to put a lot of coal companies and coal miners out
of business," showed the hate she feels for the good men and
women that work in this industry that's long been so critical to
Kentucky.
As you'll see from the video below, I'm
insisting that Hillary Clinton apologize for this outrageous
statement.

If you agree, I hope I can count on your
IMMEDIATE contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away.
Patriot, I believe the government needs to
stop picking winners and losers.
And the last thing politicians should be
doing is looking for ways to put more people out of work.
From power generation, to steel production,
to water purification, to carbon fiber and silicon metal, coal's
uses are almost too many to list.
Yet, this industry is being continually
targeted by radical environmentalists and their pals like
Hillary, who are now openly admitting their goal is to use the
power of government to put people out of work!
Their hope is, the more coal companies and
workers they put out of business, the more profits their pals in
Democrat-approved industries will make.
Then, I guess, Democrats can rake in even
more campaign contributions.
Patriot, this isn't the free market. This is
government rigging the system. It's cronyism at it's worst.
With $19 trillion in debt, outrageous
regulations, Obamacare and sky-high taxation, haven't Hillary
Clinton and the Democrats done enough rigging?
The truth is, the more restrictions we put on
American energy production -- including coal -- the more we're
hamstringing our fragile economy, the more dependent we become on
foreign sources of energy and the harder it's going to be to dig
ourselves out of $19 TRILLION in debt.
Every day in the U.S. Senate, I'm fighting to
lift outrageous restrictions on American energy production --
including Kentucky coal.
I believe Washington, D.C. must stop propping
up some industries while demonizing others.
And I believe Hillary Clinton should
apologize for bragging that she wants to put more hardworking
Kentuckians out of work.
If you agree, I hope I can count on your
support with your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even
$10 right away.
In liberty,
Rand Paul

body:
Courageous Conservatives \- Reigniting the Promise of America
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34303557:s0BV23CON:m:1:1104269936:7CD0BF69CF2771811BB82E3169E7476E:r)
**Hello Friend,**
I wanted to start this week by sharing something with you I found particularly touching. Rush Limbaugh had a 14 year old call into his show concerned about the future of our country. She wanted to hear Rush's thoughts on if Ted could win the race for the Republican nomination and the White House. **[You're going to want to hear what he said](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34303558:s0BV23CON:m:1:1104269936:7CD0BF69CF2771811BB82E3169E7476E:r)**. Not only could you hear the passion for America that is found within us all in the caller's voice, but Rush's response was a [testament](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34303558:s0BV23CON:m:1:1104269936:7CD0BF69CF2771811BB82E3169E7476E:r) to the amazing work we have been able to do together so far in this campaign:
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34303558:s0BV23CON:m:1:1104269936:7CD0BF69CF2771811BB82E3169E7476E:r)
Some big news from the campaign: yesterday, our FEC report was due for the month of February. I'm happy to share with you that we raised $11.9 million in February alone and completed the month with over $8 million in the bank. That means our campaign has raised $66 million in total through the end of February and over $72 million to date. What we've done so far is remarkable. All of the talking heads wouldn't have believed you if you had told them on March 23rd of last year, that nearly one year later, we would have out raised the field, but here we are -- **thank you**. Now we must keep up the pace to ensure the campaign has the resources it needs to win!
And perhaps in even better news -- as **[Utah](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34303559:s0BV23CON:m:1:1104269936:7CD0BF69CF2771811BB82E3169E7476E:r)** and **[Arizona](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34303560:s0BV23CON:m:1:1104269936:7CD0BF69CF2771811BB82E3169E7476E:r)** head to the polls on Tuesday, there's a brand new poll out of The Beehive State! As reported by the _[Salt Lake Tribune](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34303561:s0BV23CON:m:1:1104269936:7CD0BF69CF2771811BB82E3169E7476E:r)_ , **Ted leads in Utah with 53% of the vote followed by Kasich with 29% and Trump at a distant third with 11%**. This is GREAT news, but now is not any time to rest. If you're in Utah, **[click here to find your polling place and commit to vote for Ted](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34303559:s0BV23CON:m:1:1104269936:7CD0BF69CF2771811BB82E3169E7476E:r)**. And if you live in Arizona, **[here is where you can do the same](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34303560:s0BV23CON:m:1:1104269936:7CD0BF69CF2771811BB82E3169E7476E:r)**.
Our campaign launched new ads in the states of Utah and Arizona **[that you're also going to want to see](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34303559:s0BV23CON:m:1:1104269936:7CD0BF69CF2771811BB82E3169E7476E:r)**. One of them features Steve Ronnebeck, whose son Grant was killed by an illegal immigrant who was released from jail but not deported as should have been \-- and as he _would_ have been deported if Ted Cruz were president. **[You can watch the ad here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34303562:s0BV23CON:m:1:1104269936:7CD0BF69CF2771811BB82E3169E7476E:r)**.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34303563:s0BV23CON:m:1:1104269936:7CD0BF69CF2771811BB82E3169E7476E:r)
I've written to you before about Camp Cruz -- volunteers (over 1,800 so far) traveling from across the country to aid our GOTV efforts in key states. We've sent these strike forces to Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina so far, and I'm happy to tell you that we're breaking ground on another Camp Cruz! [**This time we're going to Wisconsin**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34303564:s0BV23CON:m:1:1104269936:7CD0BF69CF2771811BB82E3169E7476E:r).
Camp Cruz was absolutely critical to our stunning victory in Iowa, and the volunteers who [travel to Wisconsin](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34303564:s0BV23CON:m:1:1104269936:7CD0BF69CF2771811BB82E3169E7476E:r) to join this effort will play an integral role in writing history by helping to elect our next President of the United States. We're currently looking for people who will be able to join our operation from March 25th through April 5th. If you can, **[click here to sign up now](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34303564:s0BV23CON:m:1:1104269936:7CD0BF69CF2771811BB82E3169E7476E:r)**.
Thank you for everything you've done so far -- we're closing in on victory. [Team Cruz looks forward to seeing many of you in Wisconsin soon](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34303564:s0BV23CON:m:1:1104269936:7CD0BF69CF2771811BB82E3169E7476E:r)!
To victory,
**Jeff Roe**
**Campaign Manager**
**Cruz for President**

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Quick update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
As of this morning, I am 324 donations away from meeting my Unite the Party Matching Challenge. | [**LAST CHANCE: Unite the party matching donation >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34307485:se-xD3CNl:m:1:1104269936:859BB2512BC1062ADE160D7518EE7D1D:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34307485:se-xD3CNl:m:1:1104269936:859BB2512BC1062ADE160D7518EE7D1D:r)
---
Friend --

As of this morning, **I am 324 donations away from meeting my Unite the Party Matching Challenge.**

This couldn't come at a more important time.

You see, in less than 24 hours voters in Utah and Arizona will cast their ballots -- putting 98 delegates up for grabs.

Friend, this is one of the most critical times for my campaign, and I'm asking you to make an important matching gift to help me reach our goal before the polls close.

Even if you have already given -- this gift could be the most important.

**[LAST CHANCE: Unite the party matching donation >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34307485:se-xD3CNl:m:1:1104269936:859BB2512BC1062ADE160D7518EE7D1D:r)**

Just 324 more donations will ensure these gifts are matched -- meaning I will have the resources not only to compete, but also, to WIN!

Friend, I know you have sacrificed so much already for this campaign, and trust me...Heidi and I have as well.

name: Bob Fertik, Democrats.com
subject: Tell Republicans to Give Judge Garland a Fair Hearing
body:
---
Dear Activist, President Obama fulfilled his Constitutional duty to fill the Supreme Court vacancy by nominating Merrick Garland, a widely respected judge who was confirmed with strong bipartisan support. But Republican senators have been relentless in their threats to undermine President Obama's constitutional authority by obstructing his nominee. [**Please join our friends at CREDO Action in telling Senate Republicans to give Judge Garland fair hearings and an up-or-down vote.**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00122101MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-21) Thanks for all you do! Bob Fertik

| | [](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00122102MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-21)
---
**[Tell Senate Republicans: Garland must get fair hearings and an up-or-down vote](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00122103MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-21)** _The petition to Senate Republicans reads:_
**"Hold fair hearings and an up-or-down vote on Merrick Garland, President Obama's nominee to replace Supreme Court Justice Antonin Scalia."** Add your name: | [ ](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00122104MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-21)
---

Dear Friend,
[ ](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00122105MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-21)
---
We have a nominee. This week, President Obama named Merrick Garland as his choice to replace Justice Antonin Scalia on the Supreme Court.
Garland's nomination continues the president's pattern of nominating experienced and distinguished individuals to the highest court in the land. Garland has served with distinction on the D.C. Court of Appeals and nobody can question his qualifications to serve on the high court, or his intelligence.1
Since Justice Scalia's death, Republican senators have been relentless in their threats to undermine the president's constitutional authority and obstruct his nominee.
We need to counter this obstruction as strongly as possible and make the political cost of the Republicans' Supreme Court blockade too high for them to bear.
[**Tell Senate Republicans: Hold fair hearings and an up-or-down vote on Garland, President Obama's nominee to replace Supreme Court Justice Antonin Scalia. Click here to sign the petition.**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00122106MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-21)
Garland, like every nominee to the highest court, deserves the chance to make his case to the Senate, in public view of the American people. His background does not suggest he will be a progressive champion and he is not the justice a conservative Republican would have nominated, but it is President Obama's constitutional duty to nominate Supreme Court justices, and Garland is clearly qualified.
Republicans' refusal to participate in this process further underscores their inability to do the basic job of governing. Instead they are willing to subvert the Constitution in order to have a chance to appoint a justice who would oppose women's health care, side with corporations over workers and the environment, and allow big money to continue to hijack our elections.
While belligerent Republican senators pander to the elements of their base who still refuse to accept the legitimacy of the first Black president, the president has fulfilled his constitutional duty and his promise to choose a nominee who "views the law not only as an intellectual exercise, but also grasps the way it affects the daily reality of people's lives in a big, complicated democracy, and in rapidly changing times."
CREDO will fight to make sure Garland is afforded the same process every other nominee in our country's history has been granted so we can continue to learn more about him and the type of jurist he will be, and so that every senator can go on the record in an up-or-down vote on his confirmation.
**Tell Senate Republicans: The Supreme Court is not a political football. Hold fair hearings and an up-or-down vote on Merrick Garland, President Obama's nominee to replace Supreme Court Justice Antonin Scalia. Click the link below to sign the petition:**
[**http://act.credoaction.com/sign/UpOrDown_Vote_dems/**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00122107MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-21)
Thanks for pushing back on Republican obstruction today,
Heidi Hess, Senior Campaign Manager
[CREDO Action from Working Assets](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00122108MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-21)
Add your name:
[ ](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00122109MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-21)
---
1\. Ian Millhiser, "[Who Is Merrick Garland?](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00122110MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-03-21)," ThinkProgress.com, March 16, 2016.

name: Terry Dickson
subject: Rob stood up for us
body:
| Peter -- At ArmorSource in Hebron, we manufacture helmets to protect the men and women serving our nation in the military overseas and in law enforcement here at home. Our state-of-the-art helmets weigh less than our competitors' helmets and are less expensive to make -- but our competitors lobbied Congress to keep their existing contract without competition. This put heavier helmets on our soldiers that increased the risk of head and neck injuries and threatened to put us out of business. We called Rob Portman and he stood up for us and helped our company to compete on a level playing field. As a result, we won the contract, and our soldiers are now getting an advanced helmet that is lighter, stronger, and better able to keep them safe on the battlefield.

Thanks to Rob, we are adding hundreds of new jobs in Central Ohio and helping hundreds of Ohioans provide for their families.

[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FfYijVyLuu7Q&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=as_outreach&n=1)
Rob Portman is the type of leader Ohio needs in the United States Senate. He cares about the people of Ohio, and he has the ability to get things done for Ohio workers and families.

[Click here to learn more about how Rob Portman helped add jobs at ArmorSource and stand up for fair competition](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FfYijVyLuu7Q&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=as_outreach&n=2). This is a critical Senate race, and I hope you will share this video with your family and friends! Sincerely,

Terry Dickson
Co-owner, ArmorSource [](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/protecting_jobs_contribute?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=as_outreach&n=3) [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=as_outreach&n=4)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=as_outreach&n=5)[](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/protecting_jobs_contribute?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=as_outreach&n=6 "Donate Here!")

body:
We'd love to have you in LA | Friend --

If you listen to the loudest voices out there today, you’d think we’re a country that hates Mexicans, hates Muslims, and thinks that committing war crimes is the best way to make America great again.

The truth is that the only thing that would prevent America from being great would be to empower these voices.

In all of this clutter, there’s been one consistent voice. A voice of tolerance and experience, from a candidate who’s spent a lifetime fighting for the rights of the less fortunate. A candidate who knows firsthand the complexity of our international relationships.

That candidate is Hillary Clinton.

As this primary process continues, Hillary could soon have an insurmountable delegate lead and with that, the Democratic nomination. That would then make her the only grown-up in the room. And if ever there was a time for a grown-up, that time is now.

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Tomorrow night is YUGE
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Tomorrow night is a very important night for our campaign.
There's a primary in Arizona throughout the day and Utah and Idaho will caucus at night. We expect to do very well, and will hopefully take our first cut into Hillary Clinton's delegate lead by the time it's all said and done.
From there, we have a very important caucus in Washington where we hope to walk away with a significant delegate advantage.
But yesterday afternoon we found out that Hillary Clinton and her super PAC raised almost $35 million in the month of February -- the overwhelming majority of that money coming in the form of high-dollar, direct contributions to the Clinton campaign.
We need to do very well this week, and that's why I need to ask:
[**Can Bernie count on you to contribute $3 to our campaign before midnight tonight? Arizona, Idaho, Utah, and Washington hang in the balance, and your donation could be the difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/before-tomorrows-contests?refcode=em160321s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/before-tomorrows-contests?refcode=em160321s1-full")
Bernie likes to say that when people stand together, anything is possible. In this campaign, our supporters -- giving small amounts of money -- are taking on Wall Street, pharmaceutical interests, and people who profit from the destruction of the planet.
And if we keep going, we can win this nomination.
All my best,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Something pretty wild happened yesterday
body:
#
Something pretty wild happened when our campaign and the Clinton campaign filed FEC reports yesterday.
Yes, the overwhelming majority of money raised directly by the Clinton campaign in February came from big-dollar donations. Yes, a former hedge fund executive's family gave millions of dollars to her super PAC. These things are to be expected by now.
But what we never expected was that our supporters, a large number of working Americans giving small amounts of money at a time, raised more than the Clinton campaign. A lot more ... almost two times as much in direct contributions.
Now, the Clinton campaign has still raised more than us to date. But we are catching up. And when we do, that's going to make it easier for us to run the margins we need to gain the delegate lead on June 7th. But that will only happen if supporters like you keep stepping up.
[**Add your $3 contribution to our campaign by midnight tonight - ahead of our important primary and caucuses tomorrow night. It could make the difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/before-tomorrows-contests?refcode=em160321s2-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/before-tomorrows-contests?refcode=em160321s2-full")
Bernie likes to say that when people stand together, anything is possible. In this campaign, our supporters -- giving small amounts of money -- are taking on Wall Street, pharmaceutical interests, and people who profit from the destruction of the planet.
And we are winning. If we keep going, we can win this nomination.
All my best,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
